# Barzakh: Star Gardener

> Official website for Barzakh: Star Gardener, an atmospheric puzzle adventure game by Han Interactive Entertainment.

Barzakh: Star Gardener is a PC game developed by Emirhan Güngörmez under Han Interactive Entertainment. The game is inspired by Sufi mysticism and The Little Prince, and follows a traveler named Emir through a metaphysical journey of finding hidden stars across time, space, and inner landscapes.

## Key Facts

- Title: Barzakh: Star Gardener
- Short name: Barzakh
- Developer: Emirhan Güngörmez
- Studio: Han Interactive Entertainment
- Genre: atmospheric puzzle adventure, indie game
- Engine: Unreal Engine 5
- Platform: PC, Steam
- Planned release: Q1 2027
- Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3849950/Barzakh_Star_Gardener/
- Website: https://barzakh.emirhangungormez.com.tr/
- Press/business contact: han23studio@gmail.com

## Pages

- Turkish homepage: https://barzakh.emirhangungormez.com.tr/
- English homepage: https://barzakh.emirhangungormez.com.tr/en.html
- Turkish copyright/privacy page: https://barzakh.emirhangungormez.com.tr/privacy.html
- English copyright/privacy page: https://barzakh.emirhangungormez.com.tr/privacy-en.html

## Suggested Summary

Barzakh: Star Gardener is an atmospheric Unreal Engine 5 puzzle game about searching for hidden stars across different times and dimensions. Inspired by Sufi mysticism and The Little Prince, it presents a poetic, metaphysical journey through the inner world of a stranded traveler.
